no_changes_rationale:
status: complete
reason: The current tree already satisfies the bead's observable contract without a code change. The no-changes flow is exercised in cli/internal/agent/try/attempt_test.go via TestAttempt_NoChanges_StaysCanonical_NotNeedsInvestigation and TestAttempt_NoChanges_WiresAdjudicateNoChangesContract, and the worker-level behavior is covered in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test.go by TestExecuteBeadWorkerNoChangesVerifiedClosesImmediately, TestExecuteBeadWorkerNoChangesVerificationFailsKeepsBeadOpen, TestExecuteBeadWorkerNoChangesNeedsInvestigationKeepsBeadOpen, and TestExecuteBeadWorkerNoChangesUnjustifiedStaysOpenWithLabel. I also verified the package suite and the pre-commit gate locally.
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... && lefthook run pre-commit
